title: unsupported MIME type for compression: application/vnd.docker.image.rootfs.diff.tar.gzip
body:
buildah build $BUILD_ARGS $IMAGE_LABELS -t "${IMAGE_TAG}" --file "${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/dockerfile/${DOCKERFILE_SOURCE}" "${CI_PROJECT_DIR}"
...
...
...
Writing manifest to image destination

comments.body: @cforce can you share more from the command and the Dockerfile.  i.e. what are the values that the variable had when the command ran?

Cleaning up project directory and file based variables

podman and buildah reject images with mixed layer types, see https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/3668
Both shall detect base image media type and builds the new layer of the same type
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
